name: @angular/cdk
description: Angular Component Dev Kit — a set of behavior primitives for building accessible, high-quality UI components without prescribing any visual style.

name: @angular/material
description: Official Material Design component library for Angular — 30+ accessible, themeable UI components built for Angular's ecosystem.

name: @ng-bootstrap/ng-bootstrap
description: Angular widgets built from scratch using Bootstrap CSS — no jQuery, no Popper.js, just pure Angular components.

name: ng-zorro-antd
description: Enterprise-grade UI component library for Angular based on Ant Design — 60+ production-ready components with a polished design system.

name: @ngneat/until-destroy

name: @ngrx/store

name: @swimlane/ngx-charts
description: Declarative, D3-powered charting library for Angular — SVG charts as Angular components with animations and responsive support.

name: ngx-progressbar

name: ngx-spinner

name: @ngx-translate/core

name: @ngxs/store
description: State management library for Angular inspired by Redux and CQRS — simpler than NgRx with less boilerplate while maintaining predictability.

name: compression
description: HTTP response compression middleware for Express — gzip/deflate responses to reduce bandwidth and improve load times.

name: cookie-parser
description: Cookie parsing middleware for Express — parse Cookie headers into `req.cookies` and support signed cookies for tamper detection.

name: cors
description: CORS middleware for Express — configure cross-origin resource sharing with a single line of code.

name: express-rate-limit
description: Basic IP rate-limiting middleware for Express — protect your API endpoints from brute-force and denial-of-service attacks.

name: express-session
description: Session middleware for Express — server-side sessions with configurable storage backends and cookie options.

name: express-validator
description: Express middleware for validating and sanitizing request data — chain validators on body, query, params, and headers.

name: helmet
description: Secure Express.js apps by automatically setting HTTP response headers that protect against common web vulnerabilities.

name: hpp
description: HTTP Parameter Pollution prevention middleware for Express — protect your app from query string and body parameter duplication attacks.

name: morgan
description: HTTP request logger middleware for Express — log incoming requests with timing, status codes, and response sizes.

name: passport
description: Authentication middleware for Node.js — 500+ strategies for OAuth, OpenID, local username/password, JWT, and more.

name: swagger-ui-express
description: Serve Swagger UI from your Express app — auto-generate interactive API documentation from your OpenAPI spec.

name: @fastify/autoload

name: @fastify/cors
description: CORS plugin for Fastify — configure cross-origin resource sharing with full support for preflight requests and dynamic origins.

name: @fastify/helmet

name: @fastify/jwt

name: @fastify/multipart

name: @fastify/rate-limit
description: A low-overhead rate limiting plugin for Fastify — protect your API routes from abuse and brute-force attacks with per-route or global limits.

name: @fastify/redis
description: Redis connection plugin for Fastify — share a Redis client instance across your entire Fastify application via decorators.

name: @fastify/sensible
description: Sensible defaults and HTTP utilities for Fastify — adds HTTP error helpers, assertions, and common reply methods to every Fastify instance.

name: @fastify/session
description: Session management plugin for Fastify — server-side sessions with pluggable stores and secure cookie handling.

name: @fastify/static
description: Static file serving plugin for Fastify — serve assets from a local directory with range requests, ETag caching, and index files.

name: @fastify/swagger
description: OpenAPI/Swagger documentation plugin for Fastify — auto-generate API specs from your route schemas with zero extra config.

name: ai (Vercel AI SDK)

name: AOS

name: clsx

name: Hono
